hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && black "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'test_.*\.py$'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && pytest "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" -x --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
